title: podochilus truncatus
intro: Podochilus truncatus, also known as the truncate orchid, is a plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The truncate orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include aiding in the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as acting as a natural antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Podochilus truncatus include infusion, decoction, and powder, which can be used to create teas, tonics, and supplements for medicinal purposes.
